message:
feat(layout): add Visibility helpers for breakpoint-based show/hide (bd-130l.4)

Visibility uses a compact bitmask to encode per-breakpoint visibility
rules. Constructors: visible_above, visible_below, only, at, hidden_above,
hidden_below. Includes filter_rects for space reclamation and 25 tests.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>
